root.name: Add 'Capital' bullet after 'Expenses' on slide 5
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly added a new bullet point 'Capital' immediately after an 'Expenses' bullet on slide 5 and avoided any undesired changes.

children.name: Bullet 'Capital' added after 'Expenses' on slide 5
children.description: Checks that a new bullet point with text 'Capital' appears after 'Expenses' on slide 5.

children.name: 'Capital' bullet exists on slide 5
children.description: Checks that there is a bullet with the exact text 'Capital' present on slide 5.

children.name: 'Capital' bullet appears after 'Expenses' bullet
children.description: Checks that 'Capital' appears immediately after 'Expenses' in the bullet list on slide 5, in visual order.

children.name: No undesired changes to slide 5
children.description: Ensures that no extra content (added or removed bullets besides 'Capital') was changed on slide 5.

children.name: No other bullets modified/added/removed on slide 5 except 'Capital'
children.description: Checks that only 'Capital' was added as a bullet, and no other bullet changes occurred.

children.name: No extraneous changes elsewhere
children.description: Checks that no other slides or content (elements, text, order, animations, transitions) were modified except to add 'Capital' bullet on slide 5.

children.name: No changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that slides other than 5 have not been added, deleted, or modified.

children.name: No new added/modified/removed transitions or animations
children.description: Ensures that no transitions or animations have been added, removed, or modified anywhere in the presentation.

metadata.task: Add a new bullet point 'Capital' after 'Expenses' on slide 5
